action.reasoning: Observation: After 12 epochs, test macro_f1=0.351, val_f1=0.0868. Loss plateau at 4.28. With 2.43h remaining and ~38min/epoch, I can do ~3-4 more epochs. Analysis: The model is converging slowly. The loss is still declining but very slowly. Key issue: the weighted sampler helps rare classes but the model still underfits. Decision: Train 5 more epochs from current checkpoint with a higher LR (cosine restart) and stronger augmentation. Also try label smoothing=0.1 to improve generalization. Keep 224px to maintain speed.
